provides: Composite preset for bookable resources (coworking, equipment rental, scheduled services): wires stapel-calendar (availability/slots) and stapel-listings (the resource) into one INSTALLED_APPS/urls/config bundle. Mounts no urls and writes no business logic of its own — the app slot is reserved for future cross-module glue (MODULE.md, preset.py).

requires.reason: composite member — carries the resource's availability/slots (preset.py INSTALLED_APPS/URL_INCLUDES)
composite member — the bookable resource is a Listing (preset.py INSTALLED_APPS/URL_INCLUDES)
